_comment_endpoint: Optional top-level `endpoint` is the default for users that don't override it. Use "cscs" (or omit it) to talk directly to the CSCS sshservice; use a proxy URL like "https://cscs-key-proxy.<sub>.workers.dev" to register with a proxy worker on first run.
_comment_secrets: Per-user `password` and `otp_secret` are read once on first run, then either moved to the OS keyring (direct) or pushed to the proxy worker (proxy), and erased from this file. For proxy mode, an optional `token` field lets you reuse an existing account (paste the token printed by the first-run on another device); without one, the script generates a fresh token and prints it.

users._comment: Same yyy account, on a second device — paste the token printed by the first device.
